metadata.title: SHOULD THE WOMEN WANT TO VOTE?

pages.raw_text:
That the world is governed by
ideals is truth so trite that we
often fail to grasp it's true signifi-
canoe. What does it mean that
in all languages the fundamental
virtues are always presented as
feminine? Truth, chastity, honor,
temperance, religion itself, are
feminine. What does it mean that
the conceptions on which civiliza-
ton and it's progress are based, are
feminine?


Industry, art, commerce, litera-
ture, poetry, beauty, we see them,
always and only, as ideal women.
What does it mean that the words
used to express the human concep-
ton of it's relation to government,
are still feminine?


Country, nation, patriotism, JUS
tice, the republic, is it an accident
that these rise unconsciously to
every mind as daughters of a
mother tongue? Liberty enlight-
ening the world is in woman's
form.


mkt $1,000.
